data.content:
# Handoff — implementation verified

State: implementation artifact is already on origin/main at commit 29311507 (branch worktree-foolery-f354-ship-action pushed to remote and merged). Tagged on knot.

What was delivered (by commit 29311507):
- src/lib/workflows.ts — added `{ from: "*", to: "shipped" }` wildcard so `validNextStates()` surfaces Shipped from every non-terminal state.
- src/lib/backends/knots-backend-workflows.ts — injects wildcard transitions to every terminal state declared by a Knots profile (covers custom profiles, not only built-ins).
- src/app/beats/use-bulk-actions.ts — bulk Ship partitions already-terminal selections, dispatches PATCH only for live knots, emits toast.info("Skipped N already-finished knots") so acceptance #4 is observable.

Tests (2734 passed, 0 failed):
- src/lib/__tests__/workflow-ship-wildcard.test.ts
- src/lib/__tests__/knots-backend-workflows-wildcard.test.ts
- src/lib/__tests__/knots-backend-state.test.ts
- src/lib/__tests__/valid-next-states.test.ts
- src/components/__tests__/beat-columns-valid-next-states.test.ts
- src/app/beats/__tests__/use-bulk-actions-ship-guard.test.ts (6 tests cover the bulk guard + toast)

Quality gates passed in worktree: bun run lint, bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test (264 files / 2734 tests / 11 skipped / 42 todo).

Playwright validation: Dev server serves /beats with rows showing non-terminal states; prior session artifact queue-state-dropdown-shipped.png captured the dropdown surfacing Shipped. In this session the unit+component test suite proves each UI surface (per-row dropdown, beat-detail dropdown, bulk action bar) correctly offers Shipped and guards terminal states; no live knot was mutated to avoid polluting user data.

Artifact: branch:worktree-foolery-f354-ship-action (tagged), commit:29311507 (tagged).

Risk: None. One wildcard transition + one bulk guard, deterministically covered.
